---
title: Shape and color
author: xiaoyu
date: '2020-09-16'
slug: shape-and-color
categories:
  - Graphical Design
tags:
  - cousera
  - shape
draft: yes
---
## Visual Contrast

- shape contrast: simple, complex, large(/simple), Vertical(Horizontal), narrow(broad).

- shallow(deep), moving(static), light(dark), soft(hard), light(heavy), volume.

## Marks, Icons and Symbols

- Icon(pictorial represents actual things, easy to read), Symbol.

## Figure/Ground

- Figure, Ground(Background), think about them perspectively.

- Negative/Positive, create depth.

- Both scale and tonality can affect the depth.

## Color

- color indicates emotional response.

- color: HUE, rainbow, value(light to dark), saturation(dull to intense).

- color wheel: 
    - analogous colors
    
    - complementary colors(rotatae $180^0$)
    
    - Color tints
    
- color palette

> Make color palette by hand.

## 颜色系统

1. RGB色彩系统：
